items.title: New patent owner Silimed lands PI against Polytech at Munich court
items.summary: Silimed has achieved its first success in the infringement dispute over breast implant technology. After the Brazilian manufacturer secured the rights to a patent for the manufacture of breast implants in a complex entitlement action, Silimed is now taking measures against its German competitor and the former owner of the patent, Polytech.
